caption: A man with a beard and short-cropped hair is recorded in a studio setting against a grey, ribbed soundproofing wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Authentic". He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a grey boom arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting with varied facial expressions. He begins by looking slightly to the side with a small smile, then opens his mouth wider as if laughing or emphasizing a point. In the final moments, he looks more directly forward with a closed-mouth smile. His posture remains relatively still throughout the clip, though his facial muscles shift as he speaks into the microphone.
